content.full_text:
May 4, 1977

Irvine C. Taplin, Jr.
925 L Street, Suite 890
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Mr. Taplin:

Enclosed per your request is a copy of the letter sent to Don A. Allen, Sr. on May 13, 1976, with regard to the homecoming event of the Association of Former California Legislators. As stated in that letter, there are no restrictions on a lobbyist donating to the event, so long as no gifts of $10 or more in a calendar month are made by a lobbyist to a former legislator who is now a state candidate, an elected state officer, a legislative official or an agency official.

If I can be of further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,

Alan Herndon
Compliance Representative

AEEhw
